corrections.current: φθόνῳ δὲ διαβόλου θάνατος εἰσῆλθεν εἰς τὸν κόσμον,
corrections.correct: φθόνῳ δὲ διαβόλου θάνατος εἰσῆλθεν εἰς τὸν κόσμον·
corrections.note: Printed punctuation is middle dot, not comma.

corrections.current:
καὶ ἐλογίσθη ἡ ἔξοδος αὐτῶν
3 καὶ ἡ ἀφʼ ἡμῶν πορεία σύντριμμα·
corrections.correct:
καὶ ἐλογίσθη ἡ ἔξοδος αὐτῶν,
3 καὶ ἡ ἀφʼ ἡμῶν πορεία σύντριμμα·
corrections.note: Comma after αὐτῶν is present in the print.
The siglum after ℵA is ℵc.a, not a second ℵ separated from A; ensure the manuscript sigla are preserved exactly as printed.
Apparatus lemma is printed with accent: ἐπιείκειαν.
The reading 'οὐ Bᵇ' is omitted before Babmg ℵA.

corrections.correct: μεριδος] μ superscr et δ sup ras Aª

corrections.current: αφρονων] φρον superscr et δ sup ras Aª

notes: Running head and body text largely match. Left-margin line numbers and verse numbers are correctly distinguished. Apparatus contains one substantive omission at 2:22 and one miscopied note at III 2, plus minor punctuation/abbreviation issues.
